display.purpose: Section titles in the hero only. Fraunces variable opsz 144 gives maximum editorial weight. One or two lines maximum — never body copy.

headline.purpose: Section subheaders (e.g. «Ваш результат», «Зоны роста»). Fraunces opsz 60 — slightly narrower optical size, still unmistakably serif editorial.

title.purpose: Card labels, skill names, step numbers in prose. Geist 600 — the legible workhorse title weight.

body.purpose: All descriptive prose, recommendations, question text. 15px Geist 400, 65–75ch line length. The dominant reading surface.

small.purpose: Captions, helper text, timestamps. Never for actionable content.

label.purpose: Level chips (J / M / S / L), status tags, table column headers. 11px Geist 500 uppercase — a technical annotation, not a design statement.

data.purpose: Score numbers on KPI tiles, skill percentages, radar axis values. Geist Mono with tnum + cv11 so all digit columns align. Never for prose.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (button hover, panel reveal). 200ms.

motion.name: ease-compare
motion.purpose: Image-compare slider drag. 0ms delay, continuous tracking.

motion.name: reduced-motion-override
motion.value: prefers-reduced-motion: reduce → all transitions 0ms, no transform animations
motion.purpose: Accessibility: all motion disabled when user preference is set.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout threshold. Mode-cards stack vertically.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Two-column mode-card grid becomes possible. KPI row 2+2.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Full 3-up asymmetric mode-card layout. Max content width 900px.

extensions.elevationNote: This system is flat by default. No box-shadow anywhere. Depth is communicated via tonal stepping (paper #F8F5EE → paper-raised #FFFFFF) and 1px hairline borders (#E8E2D6). A panel sitting on page is white (#FFFFFF) on warm off-white (#F8F5EE) — visible step without shadow. The absence of shadow is a design statement: this reads as a printed document, not an app with layered surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default CTA. Ink background — authority without decoration. No border-radius rounding to speak of (4px), no shadow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1A1815; color: #F8F5EE; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0; padding: 12px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1F7B88; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2EA8B8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #14555C; }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Blueprint Teal CTA — used on primary mode-card action only. One per screen maximum.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #2EA8B8; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 12px 22px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #1F7B88; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2EA8B8; outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #E0F0F2; } .ds-btn-accent:active { background: #14555C; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Paper background with ink text. Hairline border makes it visible on paper surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #F8F5EE; color: #1A1815; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 12px 22px; border: 1px solid #E8E2D6; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FFFFFF; border-color: #D6CDB9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2EA8B8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: #F0EDE6; }

components.name: Panel
components.description: Standard container for content sections. White on off-white paper — tonal separation without shadow. 8px radius is the maximum for this system.

components.name: Level Chip
components.description: Grade badge — J / M / S / L. Monochrome, technical annotation style. No colour per level — the label text is enough.
components.css: .ds-level-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.4; padding: 3px 8px; background: #E8E2D6; color: #1A1815; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Mode Card
components.description: Signature component — one of three entry-point cards on the hero. Asymmetric layout: the first card (самодиагностика) is wider (~60% of row). Numbered 01/02/03 in Fraunces display. No emoji. Each card has a single CTA. Border-left:3px accent stripe on the featured card only.
components.html:
01

Самодиагностика

9 вопросов — по одному на навык. Выберите формулировку, которая точно описывает ваш реальный уровень.
components.css: .ds-mode-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8E2D6; border-radius: 4px; padding: 28px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .ds-mode-card--featured { border-left: 3px solid #2EA8B8; } .ds-mode-card__num { font-family: Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', Georgia, serif; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: #D6CDB9; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 144; } .ds-mode-card__title { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1815; margin: 0; } .ds-mode-card__desc { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: #3A3530; margin: 0; flex: 1; }

components.name: KPI Tile
components.description: Results dashboard tile — 4 in a row. Shows a single metric: score number in Geist Mono + label + optional status colour on the number. White panel, hairline border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-kpi-tile { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E8E2D6; border-radius: 4px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-kpi-tile__value { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.1; color: #1A1815; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1, 'cv11' 1; } .ds-kpi-tile__value[data-status='ok'] { color: #3C5A3E; } .ds-kpi-tile__value[data-status='warn'] { color: #A06A1F; } .ds-kpi-tile__value[data-status='bad'] { color: #8B2F2F; } .ds-kpi-tile__label { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B6660; }

components.name: Skill Bar
components.description: Horizontal bar in the skills breakdown table. 2px ink-colored track with teal marker at current value. Score in Geist Mono right-aligned. The bar width is the skill's score as % of max (4). Status colour applied to score number only, not the bar fill.
components.html:
Information Architecture
3 / 4
components.css: .ds-skill-bar { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr auto; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #E8E2D6; } .ds-skill-bar:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .ds-skill-bar__name { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; color: #3A3530; } .ds-skill-bar__track { position: relative; height: 2px; background: #E8E2D6; border-radius: 1px; } .ds-skill-bar__fill { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; background: #1A1815; border-radius: 1px; transition: width 600ms cubic-bezier(0.0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-skill-bar__marker { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #2EA8B8; border-radius: 50%; transition: left 600ms cubic-bezier(0.0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-skill-bar__score { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1A1815; font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1; } .ds-skill-bar__score[data-status='ok'] { color: #3C5A3E; } .ds-skill-bar__score[data-status='warn'] { color: #A06A1F; } .ds-skill-bar__score[data-status='bad'] { color: #8B2F2F; }

components.name: Image Compare Slider
components.description: ДО/ПОСЛЕ section — drag handle between two images. Hairline vertical divider + circular handle with teal border. Keyboard accessible (arrow keys). Labels 'ДО' / 'ПОСЛЕ' in label typography, always visible.
components.html:
ДО
ПОСЛЕ
⇔
components.css: .ds-compare { position: relative; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #E8E2D6; border-radius: 4px; cursor: col-resize; user-select: none; } .ds-compare__before, .ds-compare__after { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; } .ds-compare__before { left: 0; right: 0; background: #E8E2D6; } .ds-compare__after { left: 0; right: 0; background: #FFFFFF; clip-path: inset(0 50% 0 0); } .ds-compare__divider { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; background: #1A1815; transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-compare__handle { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 36px; height: 36px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 2px solid #2EA8B8; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2EA8B8; cursor: col-resize; } .ds-compare__handle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2EA8B8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-compare__label { position: absolute; bottom: 12px; font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B6660; left: 12px; } .ds-compare__label--after { left: auto; right: 12px; }

components.name: Step Block
components.description: Numbered step in the quiz flow and the 'что делать дальше' section. Large Fraunces display numeral (muted level-j color) + title + body. Not a list — each step is a standalone block with hairline top border.
components.html:
01

Information Architecture

Как вы проектируете структуру и навигацию продукта.
components.css: .ds-step { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr; gap: 24px; align-items: start; padding: 24px 0; border-top: 1px solid #E8E2D6; } .ds-step:first-child { border-top: none; } .ds-step__num { font-family: Fraunces, 'Times New Roman', Georgia, serif; font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; color: #C9C2B6; font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 144; padding-top: 4px; } .ds-step__title { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A1815; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-step__body { font-family: Geist, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; color: #3A3530; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Это не лендинг и не квиз — это инструмент-документация в духе Apple HIG, patterns.dev и Origami Studio docs. Каждый экран читается как страница серьёзного справочника по дизайну: тёплая бумага, чернильная типографика, диаграммы как первоклассный контент, ноль декораций. Личность системы — senior-консультант или хороший профессор, который говорит точно, ссылается на паттерны и не пытается понравиться.

Blueprint Teal (#2EA8B8) играет роль blueprint-чернил в техническом руководстве — приглушённый сине-зелёный, который инженеры и архитекторы веками используют в чертежах и lab-notebooks. Не «AI-cyan», не Stripe-blue, не neon. Десатурированный (≈60% saturation) и сдвинутый в зелёную сторону, он читается как «инструментальный», а не «декоративный». Его мало, он стоит ровно там, где требует внимания: основной CTA, focus-state, маркер «вот ваше текущее значение».

Система явно отвергает: дженерик SaaS (Inter + Stripe-blue + симметричные карточки с эмодзи), Awwwards-брутализм с GSAP-фейерверками, Notion/16personalities-стиль с пастельными блобами и игровыми поздравлениями, hustle/coach-вайб «прокачай себя за 30 дней». Тон спокойный, диагностический, не утешающий.
keyCharacteristics: Off-white paper (#F8F5EE) как основной фон, ink (#1A1815) как основной цвет текста
Editorial pairing: Fraunces (Display) × Geist Sans (Body) × Geist Mono (Data)
Flat by default — никаких box-shadow, только 1px hairline borders
Asymmetric grid — отказ от трёх одинаковых карточек в ряд
Density over decoration — данные плотные, декоративный whitespace исключён

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Teal используется на ≤8% площади любого экрана. Если она занимает больше — это уже бренд-цвет, и инструмент перестаёт читаться как документация.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Ни одна поверхность не получает box-shadow. Глубина читается через тональный шаг: paper (#F8F5EE) → paper-raised (#FFFFFF) + 1px hairline border.

rules.name: The Numeral-not-Emoji Rule
rules.body: Любая иерархия, порядок или группировка передаётся числом (01/02/03) или текстом — никогда эмодзи или пиктограммами-иконками.

rules.name: The Data-First Rule
rules.body: Каждое утверждение о навыке подкреплено числом или паттерном. Ни одного «честно» или «глубоко» без score или артефакта рядом.

rules.name: The Geist-Mono-for-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Любой вывод данных (score, процент, ось радара) использует Geist Mono с tnum+cv11. Никогда — Geist Sans для цифр в data-контексте.

dos: Do use Archive Paper (#F8F5EE) as the body background — never pure white or cold gray.
Do use Fraunces only for Display (hero title) and Headline (section subheaders) — no Fraunces in body copy.
Do use Geist Mono for all score values, percentages, and axis labels on charts.
Do communicate hierarchy through 1px hairline borders and tonal background steps, not shadows.
Do use asymmetric column widths for mode cards — the primary entry point should occupy more visual real estate.
Do keep Blueprint Teal to three uses per screen: primary CTA, focus ring, and data marker.
Do use uppercase label typography (0.6875rem, 0.08em tracking) for all chip labels and column headers.
Do number steps and cards with Fraunces display numerals (01/02/03) in level-j color (#C9C2B6) — muted, not decorative.
Do pass prefers-reduced-motion — all transitions must be suppressed to 0ms when the user preference is set.
donts: Don't use Inter — it is the primary anti-reference. Use Geist Sans for all UI copy.
Don't use #2E5BFF (Stripe-blue) or any electric blue — the accent is Blueprint Teal (#2EA8B8), desaturated and warm-shifted.
Don't use emoji in UI — not as icons, not in headings, not in result messages.
Don't add box-shadow to any surface — not to panels, not to buttons, not to modal overlays.
Don't use pastel radial-gradient blobs as background decoration — this is an anti-reference (Notion/16personalities pattern).
Don't use border-radius > 8px on any component.
Don't use three identical symmetrical cards in a row — the grid is intentionally asymmetric.
Don't write motivational copy: no 'верь в себя', no 'не переживайте', no 'стань лучшей версией'.
Don't use accent color for full-bleed backgrounds, navigation icons, or inline text links.
Don't use GSAP, scroll-jacking, parallax, infinite marquee, or any motion that runs without user gesture.
Don't use true black (#000000) or true white (#FFFFFF) as primary surface colors — use ink (#1A1815) and paper (#F8F5EE).
